headline.question: Which non-tinygrad-generated kernels run on the DEFAULT path?
headline.interpretation: 4 kernels on the default path are non-tinygrad-generated. 1 is search/codegen-generated (G3 Q4_K GEMV); 3 are hand-owned (Q6_K coop, owned attention two-kernel, prefill pipe assembly). Everything else in the model is tinygrad_scheduler-generated.

rows.route_guard: tinygrad/llm/model.py:255 getenv('BUBBLEBEAM_FUTURESIGHT', 1)==1 (default-on) -> :257-264 q4k_g3_lanemap_gemv_kernel fires FIRST for g3_bubblebeam_shape, short-circuiting the owned-warp guards
rows.kernel_source: extra/qk_gemv_g3_codegen_lowering.py q4k_g3_lanemap_gemv_kernel (UOp program from extra/qk_gemv_g2_lanemap.py Q4KGateUpLaneMap)
rows.next_action: keep promoted; PMS-R5 turn into reusable LaneMapTemplate; do NOT reopen Q4_K layout reshuffle while parity holds

rows.shape_guard: same shapes; reached only when BUBBLEBEAM_FUTURESIGHT=0
rows.route_guard: tinygrad/llm/model.py:318 getenv('Q4K_GEMV_WARP_PROJ', 1) (q/o) + :360 getenv('Q4K_GEMV_WARP', 1) (gate/up+down). Guards still default 1 but the G3 branch intercepts first on the default path.
rows.rollback_flag: n/a (this IS the rollback/reference for G3)
rows.next_action: keep as rollback/oracle; do not delete

rows.rollback_flag: none (shipped baseline; Q6K_DIRECT_ROUTE alt is refuted/default-off)
rows.next_action: keep shipped; no active pure replacement (direct route refuted)
do NOT reopen as built (-5.44% median W==D); only with a different topology than half-warp

rows.kernel_source: extra/qk_owned_flash_decode_graph_node.py amdgcn_flash_decode -> extra/qk_owned_flash_decode.hip (owned_flash_tile_gqa_whole + owned_flash_combine, two Ops.PROGRAM nodes)
rows.next_action: keep shipped; low-leverage (wall-share ~10%@512 ->~0%@4096); do NOT make attention the max-out target

rows.route_guard: tinygrad/llm/model.py:1076-1085 DECODE_ATTN_GENERATED_WHOLECACHE generated route, selected when DECODE_ATTN_AMDGCN_TILE=0
rows.next_action: infrastructure/research only (~60-68% of owned); reopen only if attention wall-share becomes dominant

rows.shape_guard: graph-GEMM ubatch=512; gate/up out_f==12288 kept on lds2
rows.route_guard: extra/qk_prefill_graph_gemm_route.py:55 PREFILL_GEMM_PIPELINE default 1 + :61 PREFILL_PIPE_ROLE_SELECTIVE default 1 (out_f==12288 -> pipe_mode=False); entry tinygrad/llm/model.py:145-147 route_pf16_graph_gemm
rows.rollback_flag: PREFILL_PIPE_ROLE_SELECTIVE=0 -> global pipe; PREFILL_GEMM_PIPELINE=0 -> old lds2
rows.next_action: keep promoted; PMS-R6 encode role policy as manifest template

rows.shape_guard: all roles incl ffn_gate_up; reached with PREFILL_PIPE_ROLE_SELECTIVE=0
rows.route_guard: extra/qk_prefill_graph_gemm_route.py:55-69 (pipe on for all roles when role-selective off)
rows.next_action: keep as A/B comparator and the rollback target of role-selective

tinygrad_generated_coverage.note: generated by tinygrad/codegen via the scheduler; no hand-written kernel. Already 'generated enough' for this scope.

source: derived from tinygrad/llm/model.py route guards + extra/qk_gemv_g3_codegen_lowering.py + extra/qk_prefill_graph_gemm_route.py + extra/qk_owned_flash_decode_graph_node.py; cross-checked vs extra/qk_route_manifest.py
